commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And they shall put my name upon the children of Israel; and I will bless them. Hebrew, "they shall name my name (Yehovah, in pronouncing blessings) upon the sons of Israel "which I will ratify. (Haydock) "They shall place the blessing of my name", Chaldean. They shall praise my name. (Calmet) God authorizes us to use a determinate form of blessing, and grants the effect, when his minister pronounces it, (Worthington) if no obstacle be put by the party.
